case_title: SMOG AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC/ROBERTO GIRON VS QUEZADA, UGO

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-13-1997, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-20-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-24-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
CON'T TO 2/24/97 FOR POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF PARTIES HAVE SETTLED AND THERE ARE NO APPEARANE THE COURT WILL DISMISS ACTION ON 2/24/97
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SMOG AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC/ROBERTO GIRON AS TO DEFENDANT QUEZADA, UGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMOG AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC/ROBERTO GIRON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUEZADA, UGO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT QUEZADA, UGO HEARING SET FOR JAN-13-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUEZADA, UGO NO APPEARANCES OF BOTH PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
